response.justification: Wei has strong full-stack experience, deep technical breadth across languages (including C, C++, D, JavaScript/TypeScript), and a proven track record in building scalable systems and open-source tools, but lacks explicit evidence of designing enterprise-scale experimentation or growth platforms, feature-flagging systems, or AI-driven measurement frameworks as required, with minimal mention of metrics, telemetry, or statistical experimentation.
strengths: Extensive experience with distributed systems and high-throughput services (e.g., millions of requests/sec at Dunnhumby)
Strong full-stack proficiency across JavaScript/TypeScript, C++, D, and cloud tooling (AWS CDK, Docker, Kubernetes)
Demonstrated technical leadership through open-source contributions, workshops, and mentoring initiatives
concerns: No clear evidence of building or leading experimentation platforms, feature flighting, or growth measurement systems
Limited mention of telemetry infrastructure, guardrails, or statistical analysis in experimentation contexts
Experience with AI tools for engineering velocity is implied but not demonstrated or quantified
